mapper.sql: r.id, r.user_id, r.order_id, r.merchant_id, r.rating, r.delivery_rating, r.content, r.create_time, r.update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review (user_id, order_id, merchant_id, rating, delivery_rating, content) VALUES (#{userId}, #{orderId}, #{merchantId}, #{rating}, #{deliveryRating}, #{content})
mapper.update: UPDATE review SET rating = #{rating}, delivery_rating = #{deliveryRating}, content = #{content}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM review r WHERE r.order_id = #{orderId}
SELECT , o.merchant_name, o.order_no FROM review r INNER JOIN orders o ON o.id = r.order_id WHERE r.id = #{id}
SELECT FROM review r WHERE r.merchant_id = #{merchantId} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC
SELECT , o.merchant_name, o.order_no FROM review r INNER JOIN orders o ON o.id = r.order_id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC
